title: pareugenia brackenridgei
intro: Pareugenia brackenridgei is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae, and is commonly known as the Philippine tree or mountain ash. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pareugenia brackenridgei include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Pareugenia brackenridgei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts can also be used in topical applications or as a natural remedy for various health issues.
